caption: A news broadcast from News18 India features a man in a white shirt speaking into a microphone during a public address. He is positioned centrally, with other partially visible individuals behind him. To his left, a small inset image shows a man with white hair and glasses, identified by the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". To his right, two other small inset portraits are displayed with the names "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार". The screen contains various news banners in Hindi. The top banner reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". As the sequence progresses, the bottom news ticker updates from "JDU कोटे से श्रवण कुमार मंत्री ब" to "JDU कोटे से श्रवण कुमार मंत्री बने". Additionally, the top headline changes in the later frames to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' हांग". A digital clock at the bottom right consistently displays "10:03 PM".
